sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float32, status String, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 1.5, 'active', now()), (2, 2.5, 'inactive', now()), (3, 3.5, 'active', now());
SELECT id, sleepEachRow(CAST('2.0' AS Float32)), NOT (status = 'inactive') FROM test_table WHERE NOT (value < 2.0) ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT id, sleepEachRow(0.1), NOT value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '1' DAY) AS sub WHERE NOT (value IS NULL) GROUP BY id, value HAVING NOT (SUM(value) > 5.0);

SELECT id, sleepEachRow(3.0), NOT (created_at = now()) FROM WHERE (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND sleepEachRow(1.5) > 2.0) AS sub JOIN test_table ON sub.id = test_table.id ORDER BY sleepEachRow(1.0) DESC;
SELECT id, sleepEachRow(0.01) FROM (SELECT id, NOT (value < MAX(value) OVER()) AS is_max FROM test_table) AS max_values WHERE NOT (is_max) HAVING sleepEachRow(2.5) < 3.0;
SELECT id, sleepEachRow(CAST('', AS Float32)) FROM (SELECT id, CAST('2023-01-01' AS DateTime) AS created_at, value FROM test_table) WHERE NOT (created_at IS NULL) AND NOT (value = '') ORDER BY value;
